title: The Strongest Demon King at 0 Months Old: I'm a Reincarnator with a Cheat Ability That Lets Me Grow Stronger Just by Eating, but Since I'm a Baby, I'll Grow on the Heroes' Breast Milk and Dominate Everything
description: A 35-year-old man dies with one wish—to be loved by a family. Reborn in the womb of Luciera, the Demon Queen, he enters the world as the overpowered baby Avsal Ambros, armed with cheat skills. To unlock his full potential, he must drink high-magic breast milk, drawing the strongest demon beauties to become his wet nurses. All he wants is a peaceful life, but fate has other plans
author: Alzawa Haruyoshi
